name: Pork tenderloin
description: Whole tenderloin, Grill sear then Bake gentle finish. Typhur chef's-choice 145°F target.
target_doneness: medium (145°F — Typhur's AF13 probe-preset chef's choice for pork)

phases.name: Sear (Grill 425°F — develops crust on tenderloin's exposed flesh)
Gentle finish (Bake 325°F — top + medium fan, no edge overcook)
